hero.title:
The "Perfect Shot"
You Missed
Recreated in 8K.
hero.desc: Transform your blurry ultrasound into a crystal-clear masterpiece. Our AI simulates the clarity of high-end studio equipment, recreating your baby's face as if it were captured on the luckiest day possible.

results.basicDesc: Basic Filter preserves the original ultrasound integrity while removing obstructions.
results.advancedDesc: Advanced Filter actively reconstructs realistic skin texture and facial features.
results.rateResult: How do you like this result?

whyAdopt.title: Upgrade Your Output,
whyAdopt.desc: Don't spend $100k on new equipment. As an official partner, you gain exclusive access to CrystalReveal™ AI at special partner rates, instantly transforming your standard ultrasound results into 8K masterpieces.
whyAdopt.benefit1Desc: Deliver crystal-clear images that rival the latest high-end systems.
whyAdopt.benefit2Desc: Save blurry or obstructed shots instantly. Reduce free "rescan" appointments.
whyAdopt.testimonial: "My clients are amazed. It looks like I bought a $100k machine."

pricing.title: Purchase Credits
pricing.subtitle:
Simple, transparent pricing.
Use credits whenever you need a perfect shot.
pricing.creditsValid: Credits are valid for up to 1 year from the date of purchase.
pricing.qualityNote: The quantity and quality of AI-generated results may vary and are subject to future updates.

payg.name: Pay-As-You-Go
payg.desc: Perfect for expectant mothers to enhance their own photos.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: Best for studios testing demand with their clients.

basic.name: Basic
basic.desc: Ideal for busy studios with regular client flows.

gallery.title: Any Device. Every Detail. Perfectly Restored.
gallery.desc: See the proof. We transform low-quality, obstructed scans from all ultrasound manufacturers into crystal-clear moments.

studio.title: Boost customer retention and deliver ultrasound images through the app moms check every day.
studio.desc: Ready to upgrade your entire studio experience? While CrystalReveal handles your AI image generation, our dedicated Bomee Core platform manages your cloud syncing, premium client access, and automated marketing.
studio.feature1Desc: Replace outdated USBs with instant cloud syncing. Compatible with all major hardware (GE, Samsung, Mindray).
studio.feature2Desc: Offer your clients a high-end alternative to paid apps like Flo. Your partnership grants them free access to our premium maternity suite, AI-driven health insights, and community features.
studio.feature3Desc: Our smart notifications act as your personal marketing team, reminding clients to book their next Gender Reveal or 4D appointment directly through your portal.
